reference_proof:
by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b2_len]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b2_len, ih]
      rw [Nat.add_assoc]
      rw [Nat.add_comm (b2_len ys) 1]
      rw [← Nat.add_assoc]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b2_map, List.append, ih]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b2_sum]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b2_sum, List.append, ih, Nat.add_assoc]

by
  induction n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n ih =>
      simp [b2_double, ih, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp [b2_add]
  | succ n ih =>
      simp [b2_add, ih, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hpqr =>
      cases hpqr with
      | inl hp => exact Or.inr (Or.inr hp)
      | inr hqr =>
          cases hqr with
          | inl hq => exact Or.inr (Or.inl hq)
          | inr hr => exact Or.inl (Or.inr hr)
  | inr hs => exact Or.inl (Or.inl hs)

by
  cases o with
  | none => exact Or.inl rfl
  | some x => exact Or.inr (Exists.intro x rfl)

by
  intro h
  cases a <;> cases b <;> simp at h ⊢

by
  intro h y
  cases h with
  | intro x hx =>
      exact Exists.intro x (hx y)

by
  intro h
  constructor
  · intro x
    exact (h x).left
  · intro x
    exact (h x).right

by
  intro hab hbc hcd
  rw [hab]
  rw [hbc]
  rw [hcd]

by
  intro h
  induction xs with
  | nil => cases h
  | cons y xs ih =>
      cases h with
      | head => simp
      | tail _ htail =>
          simpa using Or.inr (by simpa using ih htail)

by
  intro h
  cases a <;> cases b <;> simp at h ⊢

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b2_all]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b2_all, ih]
      rw [Bool.and_assoc]

by
  induction xs with
  | nil => simp [b2_any]
  | cons x xs ih =>
      simp [b2_any, ih]
      rw [Bool.or_assoc]
